name: Catch of the Day
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:
extraction_notes: This upgrade grants a trigger to all actions on the model's stat card rather than granting new actions. The trigger details are:

Hook, Line, and Sinker: (t) - After Succeeding - This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. Friendly models within (n)2" of this model gain an enemy Staggered token. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
Since this is a trigger modification rather than a granted action, it does not fit the standard granted_actions structure. The upgrade modifies existing actions rather than providing new ones.
